scene: Wapol Mocks the Doctor. Hiriluk faces Wapol’s deception and declares that people live on through their dreams before his final sacrifice. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.text: He blew himself up on his own!

dialogue.text: A fitting end for the looniest Loon I ever knew! Mahahaha!
